title: pelargonium dipetalum
intro: Pelargonium dipetalum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and easing symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium can be made into teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
